summary: A 2019 DHS/NASCAR 'See Something, Say Something' PSA: driver Chris Buescher (Kroger car) stands in his racing suit and speaks directly to camera, telling fans at the Talladega track that safety is everyone's responsibility and to report suspicious activity. It is a static narrated celebrity spokesperson spot with NASCAR/DHS logos, not a music-driven spectacle or genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope.
notable_text: Protect your every day. If you see something, say something. REPORT SUSPICIOUS ACTIVITY. NASCAR / SeeSay / Homeland Security.
